perturbation.original_text: 1. DEFINITIONS 1.1 "Spinrecords.com Brand Features" means the SpinRecords.com name and logo and other trademarks, trade names and service names including but not limited to those set forth on Exhibit A attached hereto and incorporated herein --------- by reference and all Intellectual Property Rights related thereto. SpinRecords.com Brand Features shall include any derivatives, improvements or modifications thereto or thereof and any Intellectual Property rights related thereto.
perturbation.changed_text: 1. DEFINITIONS 1.1 "Spinrecords.com Brand Features" means the SpinRecords.com name and logo and other trademarks, trade names and service names including but not limited to those set forth on Exhibit A attached hereto and incorporated herein --------- by reference and all Intellectual Property Rights related thereto. SpinRecords.com Brand Features shall not include any derivatives, improvements or modifications thereto or thereof and any Intellectual Property rights related thereto.
perturbation.explanation: The original definition of “Spinrecords.com Brand Features” includes any derivatives, improvements, or modifications. The modified definition explicitly excludes them. This contradicts Section 3.2, which grants NETTAXI a license to make derivative works from the SpinRecords.com Brand Features, creating uncertainty about the scope of NETTAXI's license and whether they can actually create derivative works.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.2 Licenses by SpinRecords.com to NETTAXI. SpinRecords.com hereby ------------------------------------------- grants NETTAXI a nonexclusive, worldwide, nontransferable, revocable, royalty free license to display and distribute the, and make derivative works from the SpinRecords.com Brand Features and any enhancements, modifications or improvements thereto as necessary to carry out the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly excludes derivatives, improvements, or modifications from the definition of "Spinrecords.com Brand Features," while section 3.2 grants NETTAXI a license to make derivative works from those same features. This creates a direct contradiction because NETTAXI is given the right to make derivative works of something that is now defined as explicitly *not* including derivatives.

perturbation.original_text: 8.1 Term of Agreement. This Agreement shall be effective upon the ------------------- Effective Date and shall remain in force for a period of one (1) year, and shall be automatically renewed for successive periods of one (1) year unless otherwise terminated as provided herein.
perturbation.changed_text: 8.1 Term of Agreement. This Agreement shall be effective upon the ------------------- Effective Date and shall remain in force for a period of one (1) year, and shall only be renewed if NETTAXI provides a notice for renewal, ninety (90) days before termination, for successive periods of one (1) year unless otherwise terminated as provided herein.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states the agreement automatically renews, but with the added change it requires an explicit notice from NETTAXI ninety (90) days before termination. This creates an in-text contradiction because it's not clear whether the renewal is automatic or requires action from NETTAXI, potentially leading to disputes over contract continuation.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8.1 Term of Agreement. This Agreement shall be effective upon the ------------------- Effective Date and shall remain in force for a period of one (1) year, and shall only be renewed if NETTAXI provides a notice for renewal, ninety (90) days before termination, for successive periods of one (1) year unless otherwise terminated as provided herein.
perturbation.justification: The original text states the agreement automatically renews, whereas the changed text requires an explicit notice from NETTAXI for renewal. This creates a clear in-text contradiction, directly conflicting with the original automatic renewal provision. The contradictory text emphasizes the explicit notice requirement, further highlighting the clash in obligations regarding renewal.

perturbation.original_text: 5.5 SpinRecords.com Rate. In full consideration for the rights granted --------------------- by NETTAXI, SpinRecords.com agrees to pay NETTAXI fifty (50%) percent of ad revenue at an average rate no lower then $6.50 per one thousand impressions (CPM) payable to NETTAXI which results when the SpinRecords.com Advertising Revenue is multiplied by SpinRecords.com's AR Share. SpinRecords.com shall be responsible for payment of all taxes based on the Advertising Revenue except taxes based on NETTAXI's income.
perturbation.changed_text: 5.5 SpinRecords.com Rate. In full consideration for the rights granted --------------------- by NETTAXI, SpinRecords.com agrees to pay NETTAXI fifty (50%) percent of ad revenue at an average rate no lower then $6.50 per one thousand impressions (CPM) payable to NETTAXI which results when the SpinRecords.com Advertising Revenue is multiplied by SpinRecords.com's AR Share. SpinRecords.com shall be responsible for payment of all taxes based on NETTAXI's income.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states SpinRecords.com is responsible for all taxes on Advertising Revenue, except for taxes based on NETTAXI's income. I changed to SpinRecords.com shall be responsible for payment of all taxes based on NETTAXI's income. It creates a direct contradiction on who is responsible for NETTAXI's taxes, which results in an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5.5 SpinRecords.com Rate. In full consideration for the rights granted --------------------- by NETTAXI, SpinRecords.com agrees to pay NETTAXI fifty (50%) percent of ad revenue at an average rate no lower then $6.50 per one thousand impressions (CPM) payable to NETTAXI which results when the SpinRecords.com Advertising Revenue is multiplied by SpinRecords.com's AR Share. SpinRecords.com shall be responsible for payment of all taxes based on NETTAXI's income.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that SpinRecords.com is responsible for all taxes on Advertising Revenue, except for taxes based on NETTAXI's income. The changed text states that SpinRecords.com shall be responsible for payment of all taxes based on NETTAXI's income. The contradicted text is the changed text itself, since it creates a direct contradiction on who is responsible for NETTAXI's taxes within the same section, thus creating an in-text contradiction as there are two conflicting statements within the same section of the contract.
